articles.title: Pesticides and Cancer: A New Study
articles.summary: A new study found that pesticides, which are chemicals used to kill bugs on farms, might increase the risk of getting cancer. Scientists looked at places in Peru where many pesticides are used. They found that people living near farms had higher chances of getting cancer. The study showed that people in these areas were 150% more likely to get cancer. Pesticides can get into our food, water, and air. Even though each pesticide alone might not be very dangerous, being around many different pesticides together can be harmful. The scientists also found that pesticides can cause changes in our bodies even before we get sick. This study is important because it helps us understand how to keep people safe from harmful chemicals.

articles.title: How Our Eyes Came From a One-Eyed Creature
articles.summary: Did you know that your eyes might have come from a creature with only one eye? Scientists found that a very old animal, like a tiny worm, had a single eye on top of its head. This animal lived about 600 million years ago. It used to have two eyes, but it lost them because it didn't need them. Later, it grew a single eye in the middle of its head. This eye could tell light from dark. After a long time, this creature became active again and needed better eyes. The single eye changed into two eyes, like the ones we have today. That's why our eyes are different from insect eyes. Our eyes grew from our brain, but insect eyes grew from their skin.

articles.title: One Change to Your Exercise Routine Could Add Years to Your Life
articles.summary: Doing different kinds of exercise might help you live longer. Scientists studied many people for over 30 years. They found that people who do many types of activities, like walking, swimming, and yoga, have a lower chance of dying. It's not just about how much you exercise, but also about trying different things. Walking was the most common activity. People who exercised more were healthier and had fewer health problems. The study shows that mixing up your workouts is good for your health. So, try to do different exercises to stay healthy and live longer!

articles.title: How to Fix Nature in Shropshire
articles.summary: A plan to help nature in Shropshire, England has been announced. The plan is called a Local Nature Recovery Strategy (LNRS). It wants to protect animals, plants, and wild places. Every local area in England must make one of these plans because of a law from 2021. Lynn Parker is in charge of the plan in Shropshire. She says the plan helps everyone work together to make nature better. The plan cannot force people to change their land, but it shows where changes should happen. People in Shropshire care about nature. They want cleaner water, less flooding, and a better climate. A council member named David Walker says better nature can also help the economy by bringing more tourists. The plan is part of a bigger government goal to improve nature in the UK within 25 years.

articles.title: Boats and Rock Pools: Making a Yacht Club a Home for Sea Creatures
articles.summary: A yacht club in Northern Ireland has added 10 artificial rock pools to its seawall. These pools are like little homes for sea creatures. They are made of concrete and look like honeycombs. The pools are attached to the wall with bolts. They were inspired by similar pools in the Isle of Wight. The project is called 'Greening the Grey' and aims to help nature by adding these pools to man-made walls. The pools will hold water and provide a safe place for animals like crabs, starfish, and sea snails. This is important because climate change is making the sea warmer and harder for some animals to live. The people behind the project hope to see a lot of different sea life in the pools. They also hope to see some unexpected creatures. The rock pools are a new idea in Northern Ireland and could help increase the number of animals living along the coast.

articles.title: Big Lawsuit Over a Dirty River
articles.summary: A big river called the River Wye is in trouble. It is turning green and smells bad. Many people who live and work near the river are very upset. They say two companies are making the river dirty. One company raises many chickens, and the other company provides water. The chicken company has a lot of chickens, and their poop is put on fields. When it rains, the poop washes into the river. The water company sometimes lets sewage spill into the river too. This makes the river green and smelly. More than 4,500 people are taking the companies to court. They want the companies to clean up the river and pay for the damage. The companies say they did not do anything wrong. A court will decide what happens. This is the biggest case about pollution in the UK.
